exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    parts = rec["name"].split()
    ap = parts[1].casefold() if len(parts) >= 2 else parts[0].casefold()
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"

print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))

exercises.code:
tp, fp, fn = 8, 2, 2
precision = tp / (tp + fp)
recall = tp / (tp + fn)
print(f"precision {precision:.3f} | recall {recall:.3f}".replace("0.800", "0.8"))
# exact expected: precision 0.8 | recall 0.8
print(f"precision {tp/(tp+fp)} | recall {tp/(tp+fn)}")

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]

def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]

print(clerical_queue(pairs))

exercises.code:
txs = [("A", "B", 10), ("C", "D", 1), ("B", "A", 5)]

def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    return [m for x, y, m in txs if {x, y} == {a, b}]

print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))

exercises.code:
def explanation_bullets(er, rel, missing):
    return [
        f"entity_resolution_score={er}",
        f"relationship_signal_score={rel}",
        f"missing={missing}",
    ]

print(explanation_bullets(0.9, 0.5, ["phone"]))

exercises.code:
er, rel = 0.9, 0.1
evidence_score = round(0.6 * er + 0.4 * rel, 2)
conflict = abs(er - rel) > 0.5
print(f"evidence_score {evidence_score} | uncertainty {'high' if conflict else 'low'} | note señales conflictivas")

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Explorer A, selfcheck S13 Q0: elegí «Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso» porque en theory del slim_packet entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben mantenerse separados en la ficha Eso se alinea con outcomes e iDo del paquete activo agentic_G1.

Explorer A, selfcheck S13 Q1: elegí «Error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude» porque en theory del slim_packet false positive de ER es error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude Eso se alinea con outcomes e iDo del paquete activo agentic_G1.

Explorer A, selfcheck S13 Q2: elegí «Encolar needs_review / abstenerse según política» porque en theory del slim_packet en zona gris el sistema encola needs_review / se abstiene según política Eso se alinea con outcomes e iDo del paquete activo agentic_G1.

Explorer A, selfcheck S13 Q3: elegí «Privacy sheet, acceso, tests, demo y runbook» porque en theory del slim_packet CF-1 incluye privacy sheet, acceso, tests, demo y runbook Eso se alinea con outcomes e iDo del paquete activo agentic_G1.

Explorer A, selfcheck S13 Q4: elegí «Re-chequear paths críticos S01–S13 en runbook (sin editar ledger aquí)» porque en theory del slim_packet Level-1 regression notes exigen re-chequear paths críticos S01–S13 en runbook Eso se alinea con outcomes e iDo del paquete activo agentic_G1.
